_comment: Your OWN known events, to measure their before/after impact. Add one object per event: {"date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "label": "What happened", "url": "optional link"}. Manual entries here are authoritative and take precedence. Traffic spikes you do NOT annotate are auto-characterized by the pipeline from that day's GA4 signature (dominant source + landing page + a human/bot read), so you rarely need to touch this file. Lift = avg daily page views in the 3 days from the event (inclusive) vs. the 7 days before — correlational, not proof of cause.
